feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Query on recommended number of Business catalogs in a Business role in S/4 Hana Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are working on building roles for Project team for different workstreams, in which we need to combine multiple Business catalogs together in a single workstream specific role for each of the SAP Functional and Technical teams. We notice that for providing access, we need to add hundreds of catalogs in a single Business role. Would like to check on below points

  • Is there any recommendation from SAP on the maximum number of Business catalogs that we can add to a Business role?
  • Is there any limit to the number of Business catalogs that can be added to a Business role, as we were able to add more than 800 Business catalogs to a Business role

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SUPPLIER INVOICE LIST FOR WORKFLOW APPROVAL
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

how to check supplier invoices which are ready for workflow approval...?

Is there any specific t-code or app name that we can extract list from.

entry.title: Create Role Customer (Fin.Accounting) (FLCU00) in Mass. Is this possible in Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Thousands of customers have been migrated without the Role Customer (Fin.Accounting) (FLCU00). We obviously need that Role to be able to add the G/L Account. I was thinking that in Public Cloud this could be done using scope item (1RK) by using the mass load functionality for a record that is already created. Its a simple insert for an already created BP, but when trying to use the mass load functionality system is giving an error saying that the G/L account does not exist(see image below for more details). I have tried it in different environments (Starter and Dev) and error is the same even if the GL accounts are the right ones for each environment.

To be sure I carried a manual simulation with the same GL account and it does create the missing role without any issue. Does it mean that all the missing roles can only be added manually?

I will attach to this thread, the images of the file that I am using to try and do the mass load. BP is already created in the system so I am only including two tabs BUT000 and KNB1.

Thank you,

M.R.

entry.title: S4 Pub Cloud - Commodity Codes in Sales docs and outputs
entry.content:
Hi All

 

I am exploring commodity codes as per solution 2U3. (intnl trade).I have set up a commodity code for a product but it only appears as an optional add (can see in drop down list) in the delivery created for the sale order.

How could I do the following please? -

1) add to output (would just adding it to the delivery automatically add to the delivery output or would the form and / or form processing program need to be enhanced to show this)

2) would like on Invoice output as well

3) would like on sales order confirmation output as well

4) Automatically add to the documents? (based on export country or something)?

    

Many thanks

Derrick

 

#

entry.title: SAP integration CBS handles the sending status change of the payment file
entry.content:
1、不能更该状态

处理付款文件APP:

发送给第三方支付平台CBS后，文件状态改为“已发送”，

CBS回传状态怎样映射到SAP，方便重处理


处理发票的付款项目APP

2、无法重新发送未付款成功的行项目

付款文件状态的API怎么获取，需要让CBS返回付款状态，映射SAP付款状态

entry.title: The customer and supplier banks check the validation of the configuration point
entry.content: Is there a common check for customer and vendor banks to check configuration points? Where can I export this data?

entry.title: Integrating PDF for Outbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hello,

we are looking for a way how to integrate PDF outputs for Outbound Deliveries to a 3rd party. I have not seen an API for this currently. There is the option to add EDI as an output channel for Outbound Delivery, but there is no scope item or documentation for this process.

Does anyone have any experience they could offer?

Thank you

Adela

entry.title: Supplier invoice changes
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

How to check the supplier invoice changes list  ,that made even after approval process and to trigger again for approval.

entry.title: 生产机的备份/还原是否有单独的APP操作
entry.content:
hello，工程师，

我们想咨询下，Cloud环境下，生产系统的备份/还原的处理机制是什么？包括：1）备份的周期；2）还原如何操作？

entry.title: We have copied new company code in S/4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
We have copied new company code in S/4 HANA public cloud and set up new company code in Make Company Code Settings - Asset Accounting-Specific. 

After that, we tried to create new asset master in Managed fixed asset apps. But we can not create fixed asset maste due to system error.

Could you tell us how to resolve this incidents, please?

entry.title: Public cloud transport from on premise 1909
entry.content:
Hi,

Please advise 

Our company creates and transfers a development transport (CR) containing ABAP code,  which is compatible to S4/HANA 1909 on premise

technically will we be able to transfer this same transport if we try to do so to  SAP Public Cloud 2402 system ?  means does public cloud support importing transports from S/4 HANA on premise ?

 

Best Regards,

Gal Kogan

entry.title: Can customers expand default memory size?
entry.content:
Hello ILM experts,

As described in the help portal page for ILM Advisor app, the default licensed memory size is 100 GB.
Is this applicable for any customers? If so, can a customer request to expand the memory size more than 100 GB? I guess the customer needs to create a case from SAP for me. What is the component for the case?

Additionally, what is the maximum size for the licensed memory? I found a description regarding the maximum memory size chart by FUEs in the "GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Service Use Descriptions".

Is this also applicable for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

entry.title: IS THERE ANY ALTERNATIVE OF MC.9 IN PUBLIC CLOUD 2408
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

IS THERE ANY ALTERNATIVE OF MC.9 IN PUBLIC CLOUD 2408

entry.title: how to do the background scheduling in Public Cloud 2408
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Can anyone tell the steps that how to do the background scheduling in Public Cloud 2408.

entry.title: ES接口数据创建时间如何更改为用户所在时区
entry.content: hello，工程师 麻烦问下，ES接口数据记录中的创建时间默认是UTC+0时区，是否可以设置自动转换为系统账号所在时区的时间？

entry.title: ES接口数据创建时间如何更改为用户所在时区
entry.content: hello，工程师 麻烦问下，ES接口数据记录中的创建时间默认是UTC+0时区，是否可以设置自动转换为系统账号所在时区的时间？

entry.title: RAP - Mandatory fields Popup
entry.content:
Hi, I have a question. I have application with mandatory field and dialog popup show correctly. But I have a problem with button Craete becouse if I don't press button GO before Button Create is not open form for new record. Do you heve any idea?

Thanks

entry.title: How to expand default memory size for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hello ILM experts,

As described in the help portal page for ILM Advisor app, the default licensed memory size is 100 GB.
Does the default memory size of 100GB apply to all customer production systems?
How can a customer request to expand the memory size more than 100 GB if required?

entry.title: 合并报表的所有者权益变动表怎么实现
entry.content: 目前的系统是S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 的版本，合并报表的所有者权益变动表怎么实现？

entry.title: CDS View for Routing Operation Overview
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have a task which is to create an Analytical Query based on the view Display Routing: Operation Overview. I can't seem to find the corresponding CDS View for the task. May I ask if there is a CDS View for this app or it is not available?

Many thanks,

Lam
